inputs.label: Contract Value (in base currency)
inputs.businessContext: Total value of the supplier contract denominated in the base currency (e.g., USD).

label_i18n.fr: Valeur du contrat (en devise de base)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total value of the supplier contract denominated in the base currency (e.g., USD).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçi sözleşmesinin temel para birimi (ör. USD) cinsinden toplam değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtwert des Lieferantenvertrags, ausgedrückt in der Basiswährung (z. B. USD).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur totale du contrat fournisseur libellée dans la devise de base (par exemple, USD).
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor total del contrato del proveedor denominado en la moneda base (ej. USD).

inputs.label: Foreign Currency Exposure (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of contract value exposed to foreign currency fluctuations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of contract value exposed to foreign currency fluctuations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sözleşme değerinin döviz kuru dalgalanmalarına maruz kalan yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Vertragswerts, der Wechselkursschwankungen ausgesetzt ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la valeur du contrat exposé aux fluctuations des devises étrangères.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del valor del contrato expuesto a fluctuaciones de moneda extranjera.

inputs.label: Annual FX Volatility
inputs.businessContext: Expected annualized standard deviation of the foreign exchange rate, based on historical data or market consensus.

label_i18n.es: Volatilidad anual del tipo de cambio

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annualized standard deviation of the foreign exchange rate, based on historical data or market consensus.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tarihsel verilere veya piyasa konsensüsüne dayalı olarak döviz kurunun beklenen yıllık standart sapması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete annualisierte Standardabweichung des Wechselkurses, basierend auf historischen Daten oder Marktkonsens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart-type annualisé attendu du taux de change, basé sur des données historiques ou le consensus du marché.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar anualizada esperada del tipo de cambio, basada en datos históricos o consenso de mercado.

inputs.label: Hedge Ratio (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of the foreign exposure that is hedged via forward contracts, options, or other instruments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of the foreign exposure that is hedged via forward contracts, options, or other instruments.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vadeli işlemler, opsiyonlar veya diğer araçlarla korunan yabancı maruziyetin yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Fremdwährungsexposition, der durch Terminkontrakte, Optionen oder andere Instrumente abgesichert ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de l'exposition aux devises étrangères couvert par des contrats à terme, options ou autres instruments.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de la exposición en moneda extranjera que está cubierta mediante contratos a plazo, opciones u otros instrumentos.

inputs.label: Time Horizon (months)
inputs.businessContext: Duration over which the currency risk is assessed, typically matching the contract payment schedule.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration over which the currency risk is assessed, typically matching the contract payment schedule.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kur riskinin değerlendirildiği süre, genellikle sözleşme ödeme planına uygun.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dauer, über die das Währungsrisiko bewertet wird, typischerweise entsprechend dem Zahlungsplan des Vertrags.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée sur laquelle le risque de change est évalué, correspondant généralement au calendrier de paiement du contrat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración durante la cual se evalúa el riesgo cambiario, normalmente coincidiendo con el calendario de pagos del contrato.

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Statistical confidence level for Value-at-Risk (VaR) calculation. Higher levels indicate more conservative risk estimates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Statistical confidence level for Value-at-Risk (VaR) calculation. Higher levels indicate more conservative risk estimates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Riske Maruz Değer (VaR) hesaplaması için istatistiksel güven düzeyi. Daha yüksek seviyeler daha muhafazakar risk tahminlerini gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Statistisches Konfidenzniveau für die Value-at-Risk (VaR)-Berechnung. Höhere Niveaus bedeuten konservativere Risikoschätzungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de confiance statistique pour le calcul de la valeur à risque (VaR). Des niveaux plus élevés indiquent des estimations de risque plus conservatrices.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de confianza estadístico para el cálculo del Valor en Riesgo (VaR). Niveles más altos indican estimaciones de riesgo más conservadoras.

inputs.label: Supplier Credit Rating (S&P equivalent)
inputs.businessContext: Credit rating of the supplier, used to adjust default probability and overall risk premium.

label_i18n.fr: Note de crédit du fournisseur (équivalent S&P)

businessContext_i18n.en: Credit rating of the supplier, used to adjust default probability and overall risk premium.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçinin kredi notu, temerrüt olasılığını ve genel risk primini ayarlamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kreditrating des Lieferanten, verwendet zur Anpassung der Ausfallwahrscheinlichkeit und der gesamten Risikoprämie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Note de crédit du fournisseur, utilisée pour ajuster la probabilité de défaut et la prime de risque globale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Calificación crediticia del proveedor, utilizada para ajustar la probabilidad de incumplimiento y la prima de riesgo general.

inputs.label: Apply ISO 31000 Risk Management Framework
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, the calculation incorporates ISO 31000 principles for risk identification, analysis, and evaluation.

label_i18n.fr: Appliquer le cadre de gestion des risques ISO 31000
label_i18n.es: Aplicar marco de gestión de riesgos ISO 31000

businessContext_i18n.en: If enabled, the calculation incorporates ISO 31000 principles for risk identification, analysis, and evaluation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkinleştirilirse, hesaplama risk tanımlama, analiz ve değerlendirme için ISO 31000 ilkelerini içerir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn aktiviert, berücksichtigt die Berechnung die Grundsätze der ISO 31000 für Risikoidentifikation, -analyse und -bewertung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si activé, le calcul intègre les principes ISO 31000 pour l'identification, l'analyse et l'évaluation des risques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si está habilitado, el cálculo incorpora los principios de la norma ISO 31000 para la identificación, análisis y evaluación de riesgos.

rules.message: Hedge ratio cannot exceed foreign exposure percentage. Adjust hedge ratio.
Annual FX volatility must be between 1% and 50%.
Contract value must be at least 10,000 USD.

thresholds.message: Currency risk (VaR) exceeds 15% of contract value. Consider increasing hedge ratio or renegotiating terms.
Hedge ratio is below 50% while foreign exposure exceeds 30%. Risk mitigation is insufficient.
Supplier credit rating is below investment grade. Consider requiring advance payments or credit insurance.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
